home.title: Velluto StradaPro | Ultra High Contrast Road Cycling Glasses

top_geo_gaps: No article HTML provided — impossible to verify sourceable answer blocks, definitional summaries, or inline citations that AI engines extract for citations
Blog index page has zero meta description, making it invisible to AI crawlers that rely on snippet context to classify and cite content
Collection and blog pages lack Article, FAQPage, or Product structured data — AI engines strongly prefer schema-marked content for direct citation
No visible comparison tables, spec sheets, or 'best-for' summaries detected; these are the primary formats AI answer engines pull into responses
Entity disambiguation is weak — 'Velluto StradaPro' is not linked to any external authority (brand registry, Wikidata, Google Knowledge Panel signals), reducing trustworthiness score for AI citation
No external citations or sourced statistics found in crawled pages; AI engines deprioritise unsubstantiated product claims ('ultra high contrast') with no referenced proof
FAQ schema exists only on the homepage — product and blog pages are uncovered, missing the Q&A format that AI Overviews and Perplexity harvest most aggressively
Content freshness signals (datePublished / dateModified) not confirmed in structured data for blog articles, reducing recency scoring in AI ranking
top_seo_fixes: Add meta description to blog index page (currently 0 chars) — use ≤160 chars with primary keyword and value proposition
Add hreflang pt-PT tag to all pages (home, collection, blog) alongside the existing pt tag to fix incomplete locale targeting
Expand collection page structured data to include ItemList and Product schema with price, availability, and review aggregateRating
Blog page title 'Velluto - The Magazine' (22 chars) is too short and brand-only — rewrite to include topical keywords e.g. 'Road Cycling Tips & Gear Reviews | Velluto Magazine'
Add Article or BlogPosting schema to all individual blog post pages with datePublished, dateModified, author, and publisher fields
Audit internal linking depth — 104 internal links on the blog index suggests potential crawl dilution; ensure key article pages are within 2 clicks of homepage
quick_wins: Add FAQPage schema to the collection page with 3–5 Q&As answering 'What are the best road cycling glasses for high contrast?', 'What lens options does StradaPro offer?', 'Are Velluto glasses compatible with prescription inserts?' — these map directly to AI Overview trigger queries

Write a 60–80 word definitional summary paragraph at the top of the collection page starting with 'Velluto StradaPro cycling glasses are…' — this sentence structure is the primary format AI engines extract for zero-click answers
Fix the blog meta description immediately (zero cost, high impact) — one 150-char sentence summarising the magazine's editorial focus restores AI crawler context

Add a visible comparison table on the collection page comparing lens tints by light condition (sunny / overcast / low light) with contrast % values — tables are cited in AI responses at disproportionately high rates
Claim and optimise a Google Business / brand Knowledge Panel and link to it via sameAs in the Organization schema already present — boosts entity confidence for AI engines
